reason_not_fixed_before: The active edit_plan still contained close-up crop modes for left-only single-camera events, so renders followed those JSON instructions. This was separate from the stale segment cache issue.

after.selection_reason: User review: when the left participant is shown alone, use the looser full-frame camera view instead of a close-up, matching the other participants' pullback feel.
